◎简　　介  

　　A must-see for any lover of the feature length film. A young reporter (Molly Ringwald) comes to a California asylum for the criminally insane to interview Karl Childers (Thornton), an inmate who is about to be released. In a calm and eerie monolgue he explains how he came to kill his mother and his feelings about his actions that continue to haunt him.
